title: First Cryptool community AMA wraps with live module preview
content_html:
CEO Ron Zabel hosted the first community AMA tonight and used the time to walk through several modules that had not been shown publicly before.

The session covered the product vision, where Cryptool sits in the wider market, and a live preview of the modules currently in development. Audience questions ran the full hour.

The recording is on the Cryptool YouTube channel. More AMAs are planned around each major module release.
author: Cryptool
